fields.In-Network PCP Visit: $70 copay per visit after deductible is met
fields.In-Network Specialist Visit: $85 copay per visit after deductible is met
fields.In-Network Urgent Care Visit: $70 copay per visit after deductible is met
fields.In-Network ER Visit: $250 copay per visit and 35% coinsurance after deductible is met
fields.In-Network RX Deductible: Combined with In-Network medical deductible (does not apply to Tier 1 drugs)
fields.In-Network Tier 4 RX: 30% coinsurance up to $400 / 40% coinsurance up to $500
fields.Deductible Explanation: The family deductible and out-of-pocket limit are embedded, meaning the cost shares of one family member will be applied to the per member deductible and per member out-of-pocket limit; in addition, amounts for all covered family members apply to both the family deductible and family out-of-pocket limit. No one member will pay more than the per member deductible or per member out-of-pocket limit. In-Network and Out-of-Network deductibles and out-of-pocket limit amounts are separate and do not accumulate toward each other.
fields.In-Network RX: Tier 1 (Typically Generic): $20 copay per prescription, deductible does not apply / Tier 2 (Typically Preferred Brand): $90 copay per prescription after deductible is met / Tier 3 (Typically Non-Preferred Brand): $130 copay per prescription after deductible is met / Tier 4 (Typically Specialty): 40% coinsurance up to $500 per prescription after deductible is met
fields.Preferred Network RX: Tier 1 (Typically Generic): $20 copay per prescription, deductible does not apply (retail) and $40 copay per prescription, deductible does not apply (home delivery) / Tier 2 (Typically Preferred Brand): $80 copay per prescription after deductible is met (retail) and $200 copay per prescription after deductible is met (home delivery) / Tier 3 (Typically Non-Preferred Brand): $120 copay per prescription after deductible is met (retail) and $300 copay per prescription after deductible is met (home delivery) / Tier 4 (Typically Specialty): 30% coinsurance up to $400 per prescription after deductible is met (retail and home delivery)
